title: The Barmakis' Wealth and Ostentation as a Reason for Their Fall
description: as a Reason for Their Fall Ya'qub b. Isbaq (al-I4fahani)715 has mentioned that Ibrahim b. alMahdi transmitted the information to him, saying: I visited Ja`far b. Yabya in that palace of his which he had built. He said to me, "Aren't you astonished at Mansur b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
